product_highlights: Baicapil™ — clinically proven natural anti-hair loss active from soy, wheat, and baicalin
Scalp microbiome-friendly botanical extracts for scalp health and balance
Botanical anti-dandruff actives from natural plant sources
COSMOS-certified extracts for natural and organic hair care formulations
notes: Provital is a Spanish cosmetic ingredient company specialising in botanical extracts and phytotechnology-derived actives for hair and skin care. Their flagship hair care active, Baicapil™, is a clinically proven natural anti-hair loss ingredient combining soy, wheat, and baicalin extracts that stimulates hair follicle activity and reduces hair loss by up to 58%. Provital's extensive botanical extract portfolio includes scalp microbiome-friendly actives, anti-dandruff ingredients, and COSMOS-certified options, making them a leading choice for natural and organic hair care brands seeking clinically validated performance.
